latestReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
In this release, scans maintain fresh browser sessions throughout, preventing mid-scan blocking on large sites. Reduced disk usage makes scans more reliable on Docker and resource-constrained environments. Intelligent scans complete faster by discovering links during the sitemap phase instead of a separate slow discovery pass. We have also improved report clarity — images, downloads, and other non-web-page URLs now appear under "Unsupported Documents" with clear labels.  Scans should start faster with the combine of validate and scan into single process. 

A new [CRAWL.md](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/blob/master/CRAWL.md) guide explains scan modes, strategy options, and recommended hardware for getting the best results.

#### Improvements
* improv: omit passed items from disk writes to reduce storage usage by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/773
* Upgrade crawlee and playwright versions for stability on Windows by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/776
* Combine validate and scan into single process by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/254

#### Fixes
* chore(deps): bump undici from 7.24.4 to 7.28.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/771
* fix: restrict TMPDIR cleanup to Docker and isolate per scan instance by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/775
* Fix/cleanup browser pool directories by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/778
* improv: false positive in oobee-accessible-label for non-perceivable empty elements by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/780
* fix: prevent Windows hang from browser pool resource exhaustion on large crawls by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/783
* fix: propagate ruleset parameter to sitemap and intelligent crawlers by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/784
* fix: intelligent crawl overshoots page limit (-p) across phases by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/785
* Fix/windows crawlee lock race by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/787
* fix: exclude crawlee* directories from zip output by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/788
* fix: cookie clone from pristine profile, pool cleanup, intelligent sitemap optimization, download/403 handling, unsupported document classification by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/789
* Fix/403 retry storm by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/790

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.10.97...0.11.1
latestPreReleaseNotes:
### Release info
Oobee is available as a desktop app for Mac and Windows. The setup files can be downloaded under `Assets` at the bottom of the page.

### Installation Guide
* Refer to the [Installation Guide](https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/blob/master/INSTALLATION.md) for Windows and Mac.

### What's New
In this release, Google Safe Browsing is introduced to protect users against scanning malware, phishing and unwanted pages. Other miscellaneous UI bug fixes are included.

#### Features
* feat: add Google Safe Browsing protection (Linux, Mac, Windows) by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee/pull/793

#### Fixes
* Open error log files in external text editor by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/commit/01d326885f7ee905e601f1fe27f8d4664c2de134
* Fixes custom flow cancel button does not cancel scan by @younglim in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/commit/c2e4a6f5dffea956691d7adc4e1cfbe4a7f809d7
* Bump websocket-driver from 0.7.4 to 0.7.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/257
* Bump axios from 1.17.0 to 1.18.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/258
* chore(deps): bump immutable from 5.1.6 to 5.1.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/261
* chore(deps-dev): bump fast-uri from 3.1.2 to 3.1.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/262
* chore(deps-dev): bump shell-quote from 1.8.4 to 1.10.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/pull/263

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GovTechSG/oobee-desktop/compare/0.11.1...0.11.4
